title: Fix frontend_sdk_boundary baseline ratchet + honest resync (CI-RED-004 clearable)
intent: Repair two structural bugs in the fence baseline ratchet: (1) path normalization keyed on pyproject.toml instead of .git, causing sibling paths to never match; (2) reason-text in identity key caused message edits to re-flag all violations. Regenerate baseline with correct keys.

diff_articulation.what_changed: check_boundary_patterns.py: _true_repo_root() now prefers .git over pyproject.toml; _relpath() resolves paths before relativizing; _violation_key() drops reason field from identity. fence_patterns_baseline.json: regenerated with correct keys (removals + one line-shift, zero new debt blessed).
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: Gate was structurally non-functional - every violation re-registered as new because keys never matched. This makes CI-RED-004 genuinely clearable.

commands_run: python -m app.ci.check_all_fences (exit 0, imports PASS, patterns PASS)
identity diff of baseline (removals + line-shift only)

files.intent: Fix _true_repo_root to prefer .git, _relpath to resolve before relativize, _violation_key to drop reason from identity
files.behavior_change: ci - fence now correctly matches baseline keys
verification: Fence passes locally with real exit code

files.intent: Regenerate with correct identity keys (fence|path|line|pattern, no reason)
verification: Identity diff shows removals + line-shift, no new additions
